Banner.title: We are your exclusive destination with cutting-edge medical precision.
Banner.parrafo1: We have designed a space where regenerative medicine and high-end aesthetics converge to empower the best version of our patients.

AboutUsHome.text1: At AlphaBelle, we understand that excellence has no gender.
AboutUsHome.text2: Natural results, absolute discretion, and personalized protocols tailored to both male and female anatomy.

AboutUs.heading: ¿Who are we?
AboutUs.title: About Us
AboutUs.subTitle: Why should you choose us?
AboutUs.text: Since our founding in 2020, our mission at Monarca Life Improvement has been to make it easier for our clients to make improvements to their properties and boost their businesses, especially when they lack the necessary resources at the crucial moment. We are dedicated to offering effective and customized solutions, constantly looking for the best options to satisfy the needs of our clients and help them achieve their goals successfully.
AboutUs.textM: Driving a sustainable future with renewable energy and high quality projects. We offer innovative solutions to reduce costs and environmental footprint, improving efficiency and comfort in homes and businesses. We want to lead the market and inspire a more sustainable lifestyle.
AboutUs.textV: Leading in clean energy and sustainable construction, making these solutions accessible to all. We envision homes and businesses with solar energy and high-quality retrofits, without financial barriers, for a more sustainable and equitable future.
AboutUs.text1: We focus on the specific needs of each client, offering solutions tailored to their requirements, unlike companies that offer standard services.
AboutUs.text2: We easily adapt to the changing needs of each client, with a wide variety of options and economic benefits.
AboutUs.text3: We offer general inspections and audits of solar systems at no cost, generating confidence and security between the client and the company.
AboutUs.text4: We offer a personalized and high quality service, providing close support and direct communication with each client

HowWeWork.title: How will we do it?
HowWeWork.text1: To begin, we will coordinate an appointment with you and your family to carry out a detailed diagnosis of the current situation you are facing. Then, we will propose the most suitable solution options for your specific needs.
HowWeWork.text2: Roof replacement, insolation, help you switch electrical suppliers at no cost. Our goal is to offer you customized alternatives that effectively respond to your requirements.

Services.title: Professionals in:
Services.subtitle: Medical-Aesthetic Procedures
Services.texts2: Reserve your appointment and receive a personalized consultation.
Services.descripcion1: Intramuscular application of botulinum toxin type A for the temporary modulation of neuromuscular activity. Its mechanism of action consists of the presynaptic inhibition of acetylcholine release at the neuromuscular junction, producing controlled muscle relaxation.
Services.text12: The treatment is minimally invasive, with a progressive onset of action and an approximate duration of 3 to 4 months.
Services.descripcion2: Injectable procedures designed to restore volume, improve facial contours, and correct structural loss associated with aging.
Services.text2: The materials used are biocompatible and resorbable, with immediate results and variable duration depending on the product and the patient’s metabolism.
Services.d28: Secondary stimulation of neocollagenesis (depending on the product used).
Services.descripcion3: Regenerative therapy based on highly purified polynucleotides that act as dermal biostimulators. They promote tissue repair through:
Services.descripcion4: Autologous treatment based on centrifugation of the patient’s blood to isolate a high concentration of platelets and growth factors.
Services.text44: Intradermal or subdermal application for deep biostimulation.:
Services.d41: Release of growth factors (PDGF, TGF-β, VEGF)
Services.descripcion5: Hormonal treatment indicated in patients with laboratory-confirmed hypogonadism and clinical evaluation.
Services.d52: Optimization of energy and cognitive function.
Services.s6: Medical Weight Management with GLP-1 / GIP Agonists
Services.descripcion6: Personalized medical protocols for weight control using injectable medications such as:
Services.text63: Indicated for patients with overweight or obesity under comprehensive medical evaluation. Requires continuous clinical and metabolic monitoring.
Services.d61: GLP-1 receptor agonism (and GIP in tirzepatide)
Services.d63: Regulation of appetite at the hypothalamic level.
Services.descripcion7: Controlled induction of microchannels to enhance penetration and regenerative activation.
